title: Nginx Basic Auth Example
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Create the htpasswd-compatible password file referenced by auth_basic_user_file before validation.
Paste the example into an existing server block that already serves or proxies the protected path.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx auth_basic module syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and a real password file on a staging host before use.
